sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ النِّظَامُ الْغِذَائِيُّ لِحَوْضِ الْمُتَوَسِّطِ، الْمُتَّبَعُ فِي دُوَلٍ عَرَبِيَّةٍ كَثِيرَةٍ، مِنْ أَكْثَرِ الْأَنْظِمَةِ الصِّحِّيَّةِ فِي الْعَالَمِ.
sentences.translation: Mediteranska ishrana, koja se praktikuje u mnogim arapskim zemljama, smatra se jednim od najzdravijih sistema ishrane na svijetu.
sentences.translationEn: The Mediterranean diet, followed in many Arab countries, is considered one of the healthiest dietary systems in the world.

sentences.arabic: يَرْتَكِزُ هَذَا النِّظَامُ بِشَكْلٍ كَبِيرٍ عَلَى زَيْتِ الزَّيْتُونِ، وَالْبُقُولِيَّاتِ، وَالْخُضْرَوَاتِ الطَّازَجَةِ الْمُتَوَفِّرَةِ فِي الْأَسْوَاقِ الْمَحَلِّيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj sistem se u velikoj mjeri oslanja na maslinovo ulje, mahunarke i svježe povrće dostupno na lokalnim tržištima.
sentences.translationEn: This system relies heavily on olive oil, legumes, and fresh vegetables available in local markets.

sentences.arabic: تُشِيرُ الدِّرَاسَاتُ الْعِلْمِيَّةُ إِلَى أَنَّ هَذَا النَّوْعَ مِنَ التَّغْذِيَةِ يُقَلِّلُ مِنْ مَخَاطِرِ الْأَمْرَاضِ الْمُزْمِنَةِ مِثْلَ أَمْرَاضِ الْقَلْبِ.
sentences.translation: Naučne studije ukazuju na to da ova vrsta ishrane smanjuje rizik od hroničnih bolesti poput bolesti srca.
sentences.translationEn: Scientific studies indicate that this type of nutrition reduces the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease.

sentences.arabic: بِالْإِضَافَةِ إِلَى فَوَائِدِهِ الصِّحِّيَّةِ، يَتَمَيَّزُ الطَّعَامُ بِتَنَوُّعِهِ وَنَكَهَاتِهِ الْغَنِيَّةِ الَّتِي تُرْضِي جَمِيعَ الْأَذْوَاقِ.
sentences.translation: Pored zdravstvenih prednosti, hrana se odlikuje svojom raznolikošću i bogatim okusima koji zadovoljavaju sve ukuse.
sentences.translationEn: In addition to its health benefits, the food is characterized by its diversity and rich flavors that satisfy all tastes.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ تَبَنِّي هَذِهِ الْعَادَاتِ الْغِذَائِيَّةِ السَّلِيمَةِ يُسَاهِمُ فِي تَحْسِينِ جَوْدَةِ الْحَيَاةِ وَطُولِ الْعُمْرِ لَدَى الْأَفْرَادِ.
sentences.translation: Usvajanje ovih zdravih prehrambenih navika doprinosi poboljšanju kvaliteta života i dugovječnosti pojedinaca.
sentences.translationEn: Adopting these healthy eating habits contributes to improving the quality of life and longevity of individuals.
